scope_note: This panel summarizes the structured course-rigor and application-guidance notes currently exported for this school. It remains source-backed and does not infer missing requirements.

areas.name: Course rigor
areas.summary: Johns Hopkins looks for students who pursue a challenging high school curriculum and take courses that challenge and excite them across academic areas, in the context of the opportunities available at their school.
areas.detail: Johns Hopkins looks for students who pursue a challenging high school curriculum and take courses that challenge and excite them across academic areas, in the context of the opportunities available at their school.

areas.name: Recommendations
areas.summary: Johns Hopkins requires a secondary school report and two teacher evaluations from school-based recommenders.
areas.detail: Johns Hopkins requires a secondary school report and two teacher evaluations from school-based recommenders.

areas.name: Essays
areas.summary: Johns Hopkins requires the Hopkins supplement, which includes a supplemental essay.
areas.detail: Johns Hopkins requires the Hopkins supplement, which includes a supplemental essay.
